crimdawn_start_run_desc: Bring as much chaos to the streets of D.C. as you can within the time limit.
crimdawn_safehouse_desc: Spend your coins on room upgrades! You never know what you might find...
crimdawn_multiworld_missing_desc: You need to connect to a multiworld at least once before playing.
crimdawn_multiworld_invalid_desc: Restart the game to load the correct data.
crimdawn_new_item1: Gage visited the safe house and something new on the table.
crimdawn_new_item2: You looted a dead cop during the last heist. Only he knows what he was planning, and you're not going to get any answers now.
crimdawn_new_item3: During the trip home you opened a loot bag to admire your winnings, only to find something else instead...
crimdawn_new_item4: Vlad came by earlier talking about the Monty Hall problem. He was obsessed with winning a goat, but eventually he gave us a prize.
crimdawn_new_item5: While trying to relax in the safe house you found something hidden under the sofa seat.
crimdawn_new_item6: The other clowns got bored and decided to hit a military truck.
crimdawn_new_item7: Some guy called Troy turned up at the safe house. We gave him to Jacket, but not before checking his pockets.
crimdawn_new_item8:
A mysterious bearded man visited you in a dream.
He was there when you woke up too.
crimdawn_new_item9: A strange box was found outside the safe house. Underneath it was a drawing of a face with sunglasses and a fist. Is this a threat?
crimdawn_new_item10: Locke was reminiscing about his old commander during his time stationed in China, and managed to dig out a memento.
crimdawn_new_item11: Wolf stared at you silently and then handed you something.
crimdawn_new_item12: During a routine bathroom inspection you noticed an object stuck in the toilet.
crimdawn_new_item13: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear a faint voice yell 'WAHOO'.
crimdawn_new_item14: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear an electrical buzz.
crimdawn_new_item15: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear grass being cut.
crimdawn_new_item16: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear nothing but the ocean.
crimdawn_new_item17: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear the wind whistling.
crimdawn_new_item18: Pondering where all these items keep coming from, a portal suddenly materialises in front of you. Getting closer you hear frantic gunshots.
